## Summary

<!-- One short paragraph: what does this change and why. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Core (BSL 1.1) — see LICENSING.md
- [ ] Documentation, tests, or tooling only
- [ ] Proposes a Cloud / Enterprise-scoped change (please open an issue first)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/ferryte` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run build` passes for dashboard changes
- [ ] New behaviour has at least one test
- [ ] Public API additions are documented in the README (if applicable)
- [ ] I have read [LICENSING.md](../LICENSING.md) and accept the contributor license terms

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything subtle, anything that needs human eyes, anything you are unsure about. -->
